codebook_metadata.title: Verified Comprehensive Codebook for the 12 Fundamental Existential Prerequisites (12FEP)
codebook_metadata.author: Based exclusively on the works of Alfried Längle
codebook_metadata.theoretical_foundation: Existential Analysis - Four Existential Fundamental Motivations

citations.Längle, 2002: Längle, A. (2002). Existential fundamental motivation. In Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Pub Inc.
citations.Längle, 2011: Längle, A. (2011). The Existential Fundamental Motivations Structuring the Motivational Process. In D. A. Leontiev (Ed.), Motivation, Consciousness and Self-Regulation (pp. 27–42). Nova Science Publishers, Inc.

instructions_for_llm.overview: Score participant testimony on the 12 Fundamental Existential Prerequisites (12FEP) on a scale of 0 (absent) to 5 (fully present).
core_principles: All scoring must be based exclusively on Längle's theoretical framework and the provided, verified quotes and concepts.

Justification must explicitly identify evidence of the participant's **'emotionally free (decided) stand'** or **'Inner Consent'** (Längle, 2002) and the fulfillment of the prerequisite's **'active part'**.
The scoring process is a phenomenological assessment of the dialogue between the person and the existential themes (Längle, 2002, 2011).

justification_template.description: Each score must be justified using the following structured fields:

scoring_rubric_justification.scoring_basis: Degree of Inner Consent and Active Participation (Längle, 2002)

scale_anchors.0: Not present: Opposite experience predominates (e.g., 'restlessness, insecurity and fear'; 'solitude… shame'; 'emptiness… despair'). Complete absence of inner consent.
scale_anchors.1: Minimal Presence: Fleeting or fragile signs; **coping reactions dominate** (e.g., 'avoidance or flight'; 'regression'). Inner consent largely absent.
scale_anchors.2: Weak Presence: Intermittent signs without stable appropriation. Person is aware but **struggles with inner consent** ('it is not enough to find… I also have to… accept' - Längle, 2002).
scale_anchors.3: Moderate Presence: Active in the **'continuous dialogue (preoccupation)'**. Partial 'inner agreement' and 'decisiveness' mobilization. Shows the required **'active part'** (e.g., 'to accept and to endure').
scale_anchors.4: Strong Presence: Consistent experience and appropriation with minor gaps. Largely achieved an **'emotionally free (decided) stand'** (Längle, 2002).
scale_anchors.5: Fully Present: Unbroken **'Inner Consent'**; stable experience and corresponding active stance (e.g., 'to be there and not to flee'; 'say "yes to myself"'). Reflects a **'fulfilled existence'** (Längle, 2002).

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am – can I be?** Can I claim my place in this world...? (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: My active part is to **'accept'**... to **rely on the support** and to **trust the protection**; in short **'to be there' and not to flee** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: Describes 'trust in the world and confidence in myself' (Längle, 2002)
Ready to 'endure' the negative sides and accept the positive.

prerequisites.active_participation_required: To accept means to be **ready to occupy the space** (Längle, 2002). The force to **let each other be** (Längle, 2002).
The force to **let be** whatever is difficult, menacing or unalterable and to **'tolerate'** what cannot be changed (Längle, 2002).

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am alive – do I like this fact?** Is it good to be there? (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: **'I seize life, engage in it, when I turn to other people'**... when I **go towards it** (Längle, 2002).
**'Do I take time for valuable things, worthy to spend my time for?'** (Längle, 2002). To give away a part of one’s life for something of value (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Conscious time allocation** to relationships/activities of worth.

prerequisites.active_participation_required: My consent to being touched is necessary (Längle, 2002). The **willingness to let myself be touched** by what is valuable in the situation (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Emotional vitality**; the 'to turn to' will **'make life vibrate within me'** (Längle, 2002)
indicators_of_absence: Aggression: **fury, rage**... to **'agitate the other person'** (Längle, 2002)

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am myself – may I be like this?** Do I feel free to be like that? (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: to **'demarcate myself'** and to **'stand by my own'** (Längle, 2002). **Encounter** which makes me find my **'own 'I' in the 'you''** (Längle, 2002).
to **'refuse whatever does not correspond to me'** (Längle, 2002). **Regret** as one of the two means by which we can live our **authenticity** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_absence: Activism: **stubborn insistence** and **leading a functional life** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: **Feeling entitled to be what I am** (Längle, 2002). The ability to **stand by their uniqueness** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_absence: Freezing type: **dissociation/splitting of emotion and cognition** (Längle, 2002)
Pathological outcome: **histrionic symptoms and/or personality disorders** arise (Längle, 2002).

fundamental_motivations.existential_question: **I am there – for what is it good?** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: The **'phenomenological attitude'** is needed, an **'attitude of openness'** (Längle, 2002). The recognition of **'what my life is all about'** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_presence: **Dedication** and **productivity**; **'dealing with the questions put before me in each situation'** (Längle, 2002)

prerequisites.active_participation_required: My active part is to **'bring myself into agreement with the situation'**... to examine whether what I am doing is really a **good thing**... for my environment (Längle, 2002).

prerequisites.fep_name: Value to be realized in the future
prerequisites.active_participation_required: Deciding for **'the most valuable, realistic possibility'**... for which I feel I **'should decide myself'** (Längle, 2002). Living out of **Self-transcendence** (Längle, 2002).
indicators_of_absence: Basic reaction: a **'provisional attitude towards life'** (Längle, 2002)
Disorders at this level mainly lead to **addictions** (Längle, 2002).
